chapter_title.en: Chapter on Whose Testimony Must Be Rejected and Whose Testimony Must Be Accepted

text: 3288 - وَ رَوَى إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ عَنِ اَلصَّادِقِ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ آبَائِهِ عَلَيْهِمُ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "لاَ تُقْبَلُ شَهَادَةُ ذِي شَحْنَاءَ أَوْ ذِي مُخْزِيَةٍ فِي اَلدِّينِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3288 - And Isma'il bin Muslim narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), from his father, Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), from his forefathers, peace be upon them, who said:
"The testimony of one who harbors enmity or one who has a disgraceful reputation in religion is not accepted."
